servers.name: hello
servers.summary: Start here; proves MCP is enabled in your build
servers.site_description: Proves MCP is enabled: ping returns pong, plus echo and workspace diagnostics.

servers.name: shell
servers.summary: Terminal runner with background jobs, tree-kill, and timeouts
servers.site_description: Terminal runner with background jobs, tree-kill, bounded output, and timeouts.
servers.responsibility: Foreground and background commands, polling, input, cancellation
servers.authority: Arbitrary subprocesses; intended to remain human-approved
servers.policy: * built-in run_terminal_command      -> Excluded;  shell.*  -> Ask First

servers.name: search
servers.site_description: ripgrep-backed content and file search; replaces built-in Grep and Glob.
servers.responsibility: Content and file search through ripgrep
servers.authority: Read access within configured jail roots; spawns rg
servers.policy: * built-in Grep search / Glob search -> Excluded;  search.* -> Automatic

servers.name: edit
servers.site_description: Atomic, Unicode-tolerant editing; replaces built-in Edit and Create file.
servers.authority: File mutation within configured jail roots
servers.policy: * built-in Edit file / Create file   -> Excluded;  edit.*   -> Ask First

servers.name: fs
servers.summary: Bounded line reads and directory listings
servers.site_description: Bounded line reads and directory listings; replaces built-in Read and List dir.
servers.responsibility: Bounded line reads and directory listings
servers.authority: Read access within configured jail roots
servers.policy: * built-in Read file / List dir      -> Excluded;  fs.*     -> Automatic

servers.name: sql
servers.summary: SQL formatting and linting through sqruff
servers.site_description: SQL formatting and linting through sqruff, with Snowflake-oriented defaults.
servers.responsibility: SQL formatting and linting through sqruff
servers.authority: SQL strings and a subprocess; no file-path tool input

servers.name: notes
servers.site_description: Repository-local Markdown memory with bounded list, read, search, and writes.
servers.authority: The configured note directory under the repository root

servers.name: gateway
servers.summary: Progressive disclosure for downstream MCP tools
servers.site_description: Progressive disclosure: any number of downstream tools behind three meta-tools.
servers.responsibility: Discovery and routing for downstream MCP tools
servers.authority: The union of the configured downstream servers' authority
servers.policy: * gateway.search / gateway.describe -> Automatic; gateway.call -> Ask First
